company_information_modal_description: Information regarding your organisation is non-compliant. Updating this information is mandatory as part of the electronic invoicing reform <anchor>learn all about electronic invoicing</anchor>. Provide your SIRET, and we will take care of the rest.
company_information_modal_info_individua: If your account is not a business, please go to the profile editing form and change the account type to 'Individual'.
